textByHash.1eb9fd051371869884d184e27d079611d37fbc2c: Don't be so sure. I've no doubt the new king has good intent, but our intentions mean little compared to our actions.
textByHash.203b98e4417d1245735822a098cb41e6e4f8d5c2: Indeed. But I guess only time will tell. Farewell human.
textByHash.404035ab493f91a416ce7c0b77a57fc75c5b26aa: Oh, I'm all too aware of that. Here, I will fade into obscurity as the world forgets my actions. I've accepted it. Besides, it's for the best that I not be remembered.
textByHash.805b67d6f9bbb797e9d633f63c894c9d5deb9f81: A step down from what I'm used to.
textByHash.b9c837963926d930b81113f44a588573c9f12640: I only hope that the work I did for my home endures. Everything I did was to ensure that Lovakengj prospered.
